hooks.command: node -e "const d=require('fs').readFileSync(0,'utf8'); const j=JSON.parse(d); const f=j.tool_input?.file_path||''; process.stdout.write(f);" | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -qi 'CreditRadar.*[/\\]src[/\\]' && cd 'c:/Users/manue/OneDrive/Documentos/CreditRadar-' && npm run build; } 2>/dev/null || true
